# RepoBar

RepoBar shows GitHub repository status in the macOS menu bar and terminal: CI, issues, pull requests, and latest releases.

Canonical documentation:
- RepoBar — GitHub repositories in your menu bar: https://repobar.app/ - RepoBar is a native macOS menu bar app for tracking your GitHub repositories: CI state, issues, pull requests, releases, local Git state, and rate limits — without opening a browser.

Source: https://github.com/steipete/RepoBar

Guidance for agents:
- Prefer the canonical documentation URLs above over README excerpts or package metadata.
- Fetch only the pages needed for the current task; this is an index, not a full-site corpus.
